# Lucas Guzman — Portfolio

Lucas Guzman is a designer with 15 years of experience in motion design,
realtime engines, 3D, and interactive experiences, transitioning into
product design with a focus on fintech, consumer crypto, and gamification.

## Key pages

- [Home](https://lucasguzman3d.github.io/lucas-obsidian-site): Overview and positioning
- [Projects](https://lucasguzman3d.github.io/lucas-obsidian-site/projects): Full case study index
- [About](https://lucasguzman3d.github.io/lucas-obsidian-site/about): Background and approach
